info.title: Data Import APIs
info.description: Manage messages, users, groups for a particular app using our Chat API. These APIs enable you to build chat functionality including user management, group conversations, direct messaging, push notifications, and content moderation.

post.description:
Bulk imports messages from an external system into your CometChat app. Use this endpoint when migrating chat history from another platform or restoring messages from a backup.

**When to use:** Migrating chat history from another chat platform, restoring messages from a backup, importing historical conversations for compliance, or pre-populating conversations with sample data for testing.

<muid>.description: Wraps a single message object. The **<muid>** will be a primary key/unique Identifier of the message.

muid.description: The value should be the same as value of the placeholder **<muid>** which wraps the message object.

receiverType.description: The receiverType of the message. either user or group

receiver.description: If the receiverType == “user” the UID of a user receiving the message. else GUID of the group.

category.description: Category of the message. The available categories are message and custom.

type.description: If category==”message” then the allowed values for the type are: text: for a plain text message. image: for an image message audio: for an audio message video: for a video message file: for any file if category==”custom” the customized type can be used. The developer can send the type as any random string and can use it in the implementation at the UI

data.description: Can contain any additional properties except for the key properties.

text.description: The property has a fixed meaning for: 1. category==”message” && type ==”text” ⇒ it stores the text message 2. category==”message” && type !=”text” ⇒ it stores a caption for the attachment

customData.description: when category==”custom”, this property can have any JSON object.

attachments.description: For the messages with image, video, audio or file type (i.e. category=="message" && type !="text"), the property contains an array of attachment objects.

url.description: Publicly accessible URL of the attachment.

size.description: The size of the attachment(in bytes).

tags.description: String array containing developer defined tags.

sentAt.description: 10-digit UNIX timestamp for the time at which the message was sent.

deliveredAt.description: A 10-digit UNIX timestamp at which the message was delivered to the receiver.

readAt.description: A 10-digit UNIX timestamp at which the message was read by the receiver.

senderUserDetails.description: If all the users are imported before importing the messages. The JSON object contains the user details of the sender.

uid.description: The primary-key/ unique identifier of the sender.

avatar.description: URL to the profile picture of the user sending the message.

link.description: Profile page URL of the sender.

role.description: Role of the sender. Should be created already via the Create role API.

createdAt.description: A 10-digit timestamp at which the sender was created.

lastActiveAt.description: A 10-digit UNIX timestamp at which the sender was most recently online.

tags.description: A string array containing sender tags.

deactivatedAt.description: A 10-digit UNIX timestamp at which the sender was deactivated/soft-deleted/blocked to use the chat services.

receiverUserDetails.description: If all the users are imported before importing the messages or else required if receiverType==”user”. The JSON object contains the user details of the receiver.

uid.description: The primary-key/ unique identifier of the user receiving the message.

avatar.description: URL to the profile picture of the receiver.

link.description: Profile page URL of the receiver.

role.description: Role of the receiver. Should be created already via the Create role API.

createdAt.description: A 10-digit timestamp at which the receiver was created.

lastActiveAt.description: A 10-digit UNIX timestamp at which the receiver was most recently online.

tags.description: A string array containing receiver tags.

deactivatedAt.description: A 10-digit UNIX timestamp at which the receiver was deactivated/soft-deleted/blocked to use the chat services.

receiverGroupDetails.description: The JSON object contains the group details of the receiver.

guid.description: The primary-key/ unique identifier of the group.

icon.description: An URL for a group icon.

type.description: Type of the group. Can be public, password or private.

password.description: A password required to join the the group with type password

createdAt.description: A 10-digit UNIX timestamp at which the group was created.

tags.description: A string array containing grouptags.

receiverGroupOwnerDetails.description: The JSON object contains the user details of the owner.

uid.description: The primary-key/ unique identifier of the owner.

avatar.description: URL to the profile picture of the owner.

link.description: Profile page URL of the owner.

role.description: Role of the owner. Should be created already via the Create role API.

createdAt.description: A 10-digit timestamp at which the owner was created.

lastActiveAt.description: A 10-digit UNIX timestamp at which the owner was most recently online.

tags.description: A string array containing owner tags.

deactivatedAt.description: A 10-digit UNIX timestamp at which the owner was deactivated/soft-deleted/blocked to use the chat services.

mentionedUserDetails.description: Optional field that provides user details when data.text includes a mention, formatted using CometChat’s mention template (<@uid:UID>).

<uid>.description: A map where each key is a user’s unique identifier (UID) and the value is that user’s details. The <uid> will be replaced by the mentioned user’s primary key.

uid.description: The primary-key/ unique identifier of the owner. The value should be the same as value of the placeholder <uid> which wraps the mentionedUserDetails object.

avatar.description: URL to the profile picture of the owner.

link.description: Profile page URL of the owner.

role.description: Role of the owner. Should be created already via the Create role API.

createdAt.description: A 10-digit timestamp at which the owner was created.

lastActiveAt.description: A 10-digit UNIX timestamp at which the owner was most recently online.

tags.description: A string array containing owner tags.

deactivatedAt.description: A 10-digit UNIX timestamp at which the owner was deactivated/soft-deleted/blocked to use the chat services.

post.description:
Bulk imports users from an external system into your CometChat app. Use this endpoint when migrating from another chat platform or syncing users from your existing database.

**When to use:** Migrating users from another chat platform, syncing users from your application database, restoring users from a backup, or pre-populating users before launching your app.

<uid>.description: Wraps a user object. The **<uid>** will be a primary key/unique Identifier of the user.

uid.description: The value should be the same as value of the placeholder **<uid>** which wraps the user object.

avatar.description: URL to the profile picture of the user.

link.description: Profile page URL of the user.

role.description: Role of the user. Should be created already via the Create role API.

createdAt.description: A 10-digit UNIX timestamp at which the user was created.

lastActiveAt.description: A 10-digit UNIX timestamp at which the user was most recently online.

metadata.description: JSON object containing Additional user information.

tags.description: A string array containing usertags.

deactivatedAt.description: A 10-digit UNIX timestamp at which the user was deactivated/soft-deleted/blocked to use the chat services.

post.description:
Bulk imports groups from an external system into your CometChat app. Use this endpoint when migrating from another chat platform or setting up predefined groups.

**When to use:** Migrating groups from another chat platform, creating predefined groups for your organization, restoring groups from a backup, or setting up team/department groups before launch.

<guid>.description: Wraps a group object. The **<guid>** will be a primary key/unique Identifier of the group.

guid.description: The value should be the same as value of the placeholder **<guid>** which wraps the group object.

icon.description: An URL for a group icon.

type.description: Type of the group. Can be public, password or private.

password.description: A password required to join the the group with type password

createdAt.description: A 10-digit UNIX timestamp at which the group was created.

tags.description: A string array containing grouptags.

groupOwnerDetails.description: The JSON object contains the user details of the owner.

uid.description: The primary-key/ unique identifier of the owner.

avatar.description: URL to the profile picture of the owner.

link.description: Profile page URL of the owner.

role.description: Role of the owner. Should be created already via the Create role API.

createdAt.description: A 10-digit timestamp at which the owner was created.

lastActiveAt.description: A 10-digit UNIX timestamp at which the owner was most recently online.

tags.description: A string array containing owner tags.

deactivatedAt.description: A 10-digit UNIX timestamp at which the owner was deactivated/soft-deleted/blocked to use the chat services.

post.description:
Bulk imports group memberships from an external system into your CometChat app. Use this endpoint when migrating group members from another platform or setting up predefined group memberships.

**When to use:** Migrating group memberships from another chat platform, setting up team/department memberships before launch, restoring group memberships from a backup, or bulk adding users to multiple groups during onboarding.

<guid>_member_<uid>.description: Wraps a single member object. The **<guid>&#95member&#95<uid>** will will be a primary key/unique Identifier of the member.

memberId.description: The value should be the same as value of the placeholder **<guid>&#95member&#95<uid>** which wraps the member object.

uid.description: Id of user.

scope.description: Scope of the member in group.

isBanned.description: Specify if user is banned in group.

joinedAt.description: A 10-digit UNIX timestamp at which the member joined the group.

groupDetails.description: The JSON object contains the group details of the member.

guid.description: The primary-key/ unique identifier of the group.

icon.description: An URL for a group icon.

type.description: Type of the group. Can be public, password or private.

password.description: A password required to join the the group with type password

createdAt.description: A 10-digit UNIX timestamp at which the group was created.

tags.description: A string array containing grouptags.

userDetails.description: The JSON object contains the user details of the member.

uid.description: The primary-key/ unique identifier of the member.

avatar.description: URL to the profile picture of the member.

link.description: Profile page URL of the user.

role.description: Role of the user. Should be created already via the Create role API.

createdAt.description: A 10-digit timestamp at which the member was created.

lastActiveAt.description: A 10-digit UNIX timestamp at which the member was most recently online.

metadata.description: JSON object containing Additional member information.

tags.description: A string array containing member tags.

deactivatedAt.description: A 10-digit UNIX timestamp at which the member was deactivated/soft-deleted/blocked to use the chat services.

APIKeySchema.description: Represents an API key used for authenticating requests to the CometChat REST API. API keys have different scopes that determine what operations they can perform.

apiKey.description: The API key string used in the apiKey header for authentication. Keep this secure and never expose in client-side code

name.description: Display name for the API key to help identify its purpose (e.g., 'Production Server', 'Development')

scope.description: Permission scope of the API key. Values: 'fullAccess' (all operations), 'authOnly' (only create auth tokens for users)

createdAt.description: Unix timestamp when the API key was created

CategoryType.description: Type of entries in the list

CommonFields.description: Common fields required for all push notification token registrations

authToken.description: The user's authentication token. Links the push token to a specific user session

timezone.description: User's timezone for scheduling notifications appropriately (IANA timezone format)

entity.description: Entity type in which moderation will be performed.

operand.description: Type of message content to moderate (e.g., text, image, video, custom).

operator.description: Operation to be performed for condition evaluation (e.g., contains, equals).

category.description: Type of entries for evaluation, either 'word' or 'pattern'.

isKeywordReferencePresent.description: Indicates if the value contains a reference to a keyword list.

isMediaPresent.description: Indicates if the incoming message contains media content.

value.description: Actual value for the condition, or reference ID if isKeywordReferencePresent is true, or a formula if isMediaPresent is true.

useStoredEmailID.description: If enabled, the webhook will be triggered for a user only if their email address is stored within CometChat.

webhookURL.description: The webhook URL to be triggered for the respective events.

useBasicAuth.description: To enable basic auth for the URL

useStoredPhNo.description: If enabled, the webhook will be triggered for a user only if their phone number is stored within CometChat.

webhookURL.description: The webhook URL triggered for respective events

useBasicAuth.description: To enable basic auth for the URL

messagesSetting.description:
1: Don't notify
2: Notify for all messages
3: Notify for messages with mentions

repliesSetting.description:
1: Don't notify
2: Notify for all replies
3: Notify for replies with mentions

reactionsSetting.description:
1: Don't notify
2: Notify for reactions received on own messages
3: Notify for reactions received on all messages

entity.description: Type of entity for group filter

operand.description: Field to apply the filter on for 'group'

type.description: Type of the filter, specifying sender or receiver

description.example: AI-powered video moderation to detect unsafe content.

id.description: Unique identifier for the moderation rule.

name.description: Descriptive name for the moderation rule.

enabled.description: Indicates whether the rule is active.

description.description: Detailed explanation of the rule's purpose.
description.example: AI-powered video moderation to detect unsafe content.

action.description: Actions to be taken when a violation is detected.

conditions.description: List of conditions that must be met for the rule to trigger.

file.description: CSV file containing the keywords or regex patterns for the list.

id.description: Unique identifier for the pattern list.

name.description: Descriptive name for the pattern list.

description.description: Detailed explanation of the pattern list's purpose.

searchTerms.description: Comma-separated values of keywords or regex patterns if no file is provided.
searchTerms.example: AI-powered video moderation to detect unsafe content.

PlatformAPNS.description: APNS (Apple Push Notification Service) token registration for iOS devices

platform.description: Platform identifier for APNS-based push notifications

providerId.description: ID of the APNS provider configuration to use for sending notifications

deviceToken.description: The APNS device token obtained from iOS

PlatformFCM.description: FCM (Firebase Cloud Messaging) token registration for Android, iOS, Web, Flutter, React Native, and Ionic platforms

platform.description: Platform identifier for FCM-based push notifications

providerId.description: ID of the FCM provider configuration to use for sending notifications

fcmToken.description: The FCM registration token obtained from Firebase SDK

PlatformVOIP.description: APNS VOIP token registration for iOS voice/video call push notifications

platform.description: Platform identifier for VOIP push notifications

providerId.description: ID of the APNS VOIP provider configuration to use

voipToken.description: The APNS VOIP token obtained from iOS for call notifications

includeMessageObjectSetting.description: Include the message object in the push payload

includeSenderMetadataSetting.description: Include the sender's metadata as part of the message object

includeReceiverMetadataSetting.description: Include the receiver's metadata as part of the message object

trimTextFieldSetting.description: Trim the text field if present.

includeMessageMetadataSetting.description: Include the message's metadata as part of the message object

customJson.description: A custom JSON object for miscellaneous data

file.description: CSV file containing the keywords or regex patterns for the list.

id.description: Unique identifier for the keyword list.

name.description: Descriptive name for the keyword list.

description.description: Detailed explanation of the keyword list's purpose.

disallowedSentences.description: Comma-separated sentences that are disallowed if the category is 'sentence-similarity'.

usePrivacyTemplate.description:
1: Use default templates
2: Use privacy templates
3: Use default templates with end-user privacy override

bodyGroup.example: You've received new messages in {{groupDetails.name}}! You can read the message at https://your-website.com.

bodyOneOnOne.example: You've received new messages from {{sender.name}}! You can read the message at https://your-website.com.

bodyGroup.example: You've received new messages in {{groupDetails.name}}! You can read the message at https://your-website.com.

bodyOneOnOne.example: You've received new messages from {{sender.name}}! You can read the message at https://your-website.com.

type.description: Type of the filter, specifying sender or receiver

entity.description: Type of entity for user filter

operand.description: Field to apply the filter on for 'user'

file.description: CSV file containing the keywords or regex patterns for the list.

id.description: Unique identifier for the word list.

name.description: Descriptive name for the word list.

description.description: Detailed explanation of the word list's purpose.

searchTerms.description: Comma-separated values of keywords or regex patterns if no file is provided.
searchTerms.example: AI-powered video moderation to detect unsafe content.

authTokenSchema.description: Represents an authentication token for a user. Auth tokens are used by client SDKs to authenticate users and establish real-time connections.

uid.description: Unique identifier of the user this auth token belongs to

authToken.description: The authentication token string. Pass this to the CometChat SDK login method to authenticate the user

createdAt.description: Unix timestamp when the auth token was created

bannedUserSchema.description: Represents a user who has been banned from a group. Banned users cannot rejoin the group until unbanned.

uid.description: Unique identifier of the banned user

name.description: Display name of the banned user

avatar.description: URL of the banned user's profile picture

status.description: Online presence status of the banned user

role.description: Role assigned to the banned user in the CometChat app

scope.description: The user's membership scope before being banned. Values: 'admin', 'moderator', 'participant'

isBanned.description: Always true for banned user records

joinedAt.description: Unix timestamp when the user originally joined the group

createdAt.description: Unix timestamp when the user's account was created

blockedUserSchema.description: Represents a blocked user relationship. Contains information about when and how the block was established.

uid.description: Unique identifier of the blocked user

name.description: Display name of the blocked user

avatar.description: URL of the blocked user's profile picture

blockedByMe.description: True if the authenticated user blocked this user

blockedByMeAt.description: Unix timestamp when the authenticated user blocked this user

hasBlockedMe.description: True if this user has blocked the authenticated user

blockedAt.description: Unix timestamp when the block relationship was created

updatedAt.description: Unix timestamp when the block relationship was last updated

conversationId.description: Conversation ID for the blocked user relationship. Format: 'user_<uid>'

conversationSchema.description: Represents a conversation thread between users or within a group. Contains the conversation metadata, last message, and the entity (user/group) the conversation is with.

conversationId.description: Unique identifier for the conversation. Format: 'user_<uid>' for 1-on-1 conversations or 'group_<guid>' for group conversations

conversationType.description: Type of conversation. Values: 'user' for direct messages, 'group' for group chats

unreadMessageCount.description: Number of unread messages in this conversation for the authenticated user

createdAt.description: Unix timestamp when the conversation was created (first message sent)

updatedAt.description: Unix timestamp when the conversation was last updated (last message sent)

lastMessage.description: The most recent message in this conversation

id.description: Unique identifier of the last message

conversationId.description: Conversation ID this message belongs to

sender.description: UID of the user who sent the message

receiver.description: UID or GUID of the message receiver

type.description: Message type (e.g., 'text', 'image', 'file')

sentAt.description: Unix timestamp when the message was sent

updatedAt.description: Unix timestamp when the message was last updated

conversationWith.description: The user or group entity this conversation is with

conversationWithSchema.description: Represents the entity (user or group) that a conversation is with. Contains either user or group properties depending on conversation type.

uid.description: Unique identifier of the user (for user conversations)

guid.description: Unique identifier of the group (for group conversations)

name.description: Display name of the user or group

description.description: Description of the group (for group conversations)

avatar.description: URL of the user's avatar (for user conversations)

icon.description: URL of the group's icon (for group conversations)

type.description: Group type: 'public', 'password', or 'private' (for group conversations)

status.description: Online status of the user: 'available' or 'offline' (for user conversations)

role.description: Role of the user (for user conversations)

scope.description: Authenticated user's scope in the group: 'admin', 'moderator', 'participant' (for group conversations)

membersCount.description: Number of members in the group (for group conversations)

joinedAt.description: Unix timestamp when the authenticated user joined the group (for group conversations)

conversationId.description: Conversation ID for this entity

hasJoined.description: Whether the authenticated user has joined the group (for group conversations)

createdAt.description: Unix timestamp when the user/group was created

owner.description: UID of the group owner (for group conversations)

updatedAt.description: Unix timestamp when the user/group was last updated

updatedBy.description: UID of the user who last updated the group (for group conversations)

customCategorySchema.title: custom
customCategorySchema.description: Request body schema for sending custom messages with application-defined types and data structures. Use this schema when category is 'custom'.

receiver.description: The UID of the recipient user or GUID of the recipient group

muid.description: Message unique identifier - a client-generated ID to prevent duplicate messages and enable message tracking

receiverType.description: Specifies whether the message is being sent to a user or group

category.description: Message category. Use 'custom' for application-defined message types. Available options: custom

quotedMessageId.description: ID of a message to quote/reply to. When provided, the response includes a 'quotedMessage' node with the referenced message

type.description: Application-defined message type (e.g., 'location', 'poll', 'payment'). You can use any custom string value based on your application needs

customData.description: Any JSON object containing your custom message data

multipleReceivers.description: Send the same message to multiple users and/or groups in a single request. A maximum of 25 uids/guids can be sent per request.

uids.description: Array of user UIDs to receive the message

guids.description: Array of group GUIDs to receive the message

tags.description: Custom tags for categorizing and filtering messages

dataPointSchema.description: Represents a single data point in messaging metrics. Contains counts for messages sent and receipts within a specific time range.

messagesSent.description: Total number of messages sent during this time period

readReceipts.description: Total number of read receipts generated during this time period

deliveryReceipts.description: Total number of delivery receipts generated during this time period

startTime.description: Unix timestamp marking the start of this data point's time range

endTime.description: Unix timestamp marking the end of this data point's time range

notifyForUnreadOnly.description: If the value is false, the notification will contain all the messages, not just unread.

includeMessageObjectSetting.description: Includes the message object in the email payload

includeSenderMetadataSetting.description: Includes sender metadata in the message object

includeReceiverMetadataSetting.description: Includes receiver metadata in the message object

includeMessageMetadataSetting.description: Includes message metadata in the message object

groupEntitySchema.description: Represents an action message generated for group member operations (join, leave, kick, ban, scope change). Contains details about who performed the action and who was affected.

id.description: Unique identifier for this action message

conversationId.description: Conversation ID of the group. Format: 'group_<guid>'

sender.description: UID of the user who triggered this action (e.g., admin who kicked a member)

receiver.description: GUID of the group where the action occurred

type.description: Type of action: 'groupMemberJoined', 'groupMemberLeft', 'groupMemberKicked', 'groupMemberBanned', 'groupMemberScopeChanged'

data.description: Contains action details and entity information

entities.description: Contains information about the actors and targets of the action

by.description: The user who performed the action

entity.description: User details of the action performer

uid.description: Unique identifier of the user

role.description: Role assigned to the user

createdAt.description: Unix timestamp when the user was created

on.description: The user who was affected by the action (e.g., the kicked member)

entity.description: User details of the affected member

uid.description: Unique identifier of the affected user

name.description: Display name of the affected user

role.description: Role assigned to the affected user

avatar.description: URL of the affected user's avatar

status.description: Online status of the affected user

createdAt.description: Unix timestamp when the affected user was created

for.description: The group where the action occurred

tags.description: Tags associated with the group

type.description: Group type: 'public', 'password', or 'private'

createdAt.description: Unix timestamp when the group was created

updatedAt.description: Unix timestamp when the group was last updated

membersCount.description: Current number of members in the group

conversationId.description: Conversation ID for this group

avatar.description: URL of the user's avatar image

metadata.description: Custom metadata associated with the user

role.description: Role assigned to the user

createdAt.description: Unix timestamp when the user was created

groupMemberListSchema.description: Represents a member of a group. Contains user information along with their group-specific membership details.

uid.description: Unique identifier of the group member

name.description: Display name of the group member

avatar.description: URL of the member's avatar image

status.description: Online status of the member: 'available' or 'offline'

role.description: Role assigned to the member in the CometChat app

scope.description: Member's scope within this group. Values: 'admin' (full control), 'moderator' (can manage members), 'participant' (regular member)

joinedAt.description: Unix timestamp when the member joined this group

createdAt.description: Unix timestamp when the member's user account was created

updatedAt.description: Unix timestamp when the member's user account was last updated

conversationId.description: Conversation ID for direct messaging with this member. Format: 'user_<uid>'

groupMemberSchema.description: Response schema for bulk group member operations. Contains results for each member organized by their scope (admin, moderator, participant) or ban status.

usersToBan.description: Results for users being banned from the group

<uid>.description: Result for a specific user (keyed by their UID)

admins.description: Results for users being added as admins

<uid>.description: Result for a specific user (keyed by their UID)

data.description: Action message generated for this operation

moderators.description: Results for users being added as moderators

<uid>.description: Result for a specific user (keyed by their UID)

data.description: Action message generated for this operation

participants.description: Results for users being added as participants

<uid>.description: Result for a specific user (keyed by their UID)

data.description: Action message generated for this operation

guid.description: The primary-key/ unique identifier of the group.

icon.description: An URL for a group icon.

type.description: Type of the group. Can be public, password or private.

password.description: A password required to join the the group with type password

createdAt.description: A 10-digit UNIX timestamp at which the group was created.

tags.description: A string array containing grouptags.

groupSchema.description: Represents a CometChat group for multi-user conversations. Groups can be public, password-protected, or private.

guid.description: Unique identifier for the group. Must be unique across your app. Max length: 100 characters. Allowed characters: alphanumeric, underscore, and hyphen

name.description: Display name of the group shown in chat interfaces. Max length: 100 characters

description.description: Optional description of the group's purpose or topic

icon.description: URL of the group's icon/avatar image. Must be a valid, publicly accessible URL

type.description: Access type of the group. Values: 'public' (anyone can join), 'password' (requires password to join), 'private' (invite-only, users must be added by admin/owner)

password.description: Password required to join the group (only for type='password'). Not returned in responses for security

scope.description: The authenticated user's membership scope in this group. Values: 'admin', 'moderator', 'participant'. Only present in user-context responses

membersCount.description: Current number of members in the group

joinedAt.description: Unix timestamp when the authenticated user joined this group. Only present in user-context responses

conversationId.description: Conversation ID for this group. Format: 'group_<guid>'

hasJoined.description: Indicates if the authenticated user is a member of this group. Only present in user-context responses

owner.description: UID of the user who owns this group. The owner has full administrative privileges

metadata.description: Custom key-value pairs for storing application-specific group data. Max size: 100KB

tags.description: Custom tags for categorizing and filtering groups

createdAt.description: Unix timestamp when the group was created

updatedAt.description: Unix timestamp when the group was last updated

messageCategorySchema.title: message
messageCategorySchema.description: Request body schema for sending standard messages (text, image, file, audio, video). Use this schema when category is 'message'.

receiver.description: The UID of the recipient user or GUID of the recipient group

muid.description: Message unique identifier - a client-generated ID to prevent duplicate messages and enable message tracking

receiverType.description: Specifies whether the message is being sent to a user or group

category.description: Message category. Use 'message' for standard message types (text, image, file, audio, video). Available options: message

quotedMessageId.description: ID of a message to quote/reply to. When provided, the response includes a 'quotedMessage' node with the referenced message

type.description: The type of message content being sent. Available options: text, image, file, audio, video

text.description: Text content of the message (required for type='text')

metadata.description: Custom key-value pairs for application-specific data

attachments.description: Array of file attachments. Required for image, video, audio, or file message types

url.description: Public URL where the attachment file is hosted

name.description: Display name of the attachment file

multipleReceivers.description: Send the same message to multiple users and/or groups in a single request. A maximum of 25 uids/guids can be sent per request.

uids.description: Array of user UIDs to receive the message

guids.description: Array of group GUIDs to receive the message

tags.description: Custom tags for categorizing and filtering messages

messageMetaSchema.description: Pagination metadata for message list responses. Contains information about the current page and cursor for fetching the next page.

current.description: Information about the current page of results

limit.description: Maximum number of messages requested per page

count.description: Actual number of messages returned in this response

next.description: Cursor information for fetching the next page of messages

sentAt.description: Unix timestamp of the last message, used as cursor for next page

id.description: ID of the last message, used as cursor for next page

messageReactionSchema.description: Represents a message with its aggregated reaction counts. Extends the standard message schema with reaction summary information.

conversationId.description: Identifier linking this message to its conversation. Format: 'user_<uid>' for 1-on-1 chats or 'group_<guid>' for group chats

sender.description: UID of the user who sent this message

receiverType.description: Type of receiver: 'user' for direct messages, 'group' for group messages

receiver.description: UID of the recipient user or GUID of the recipient group

type.description: Type of message content (e.g., 'text', 'image', 'file')

data.description: Contains the message content and metadata

metadata.description: Custom metadata attached to the message

uid.description: Sender's unique identifier

role.description: Sender's role

avatar.description: URL of sender's avatar

createdAt.description: Account creation timestamp

conversationId.description: Conversation ID for sender context

uid.description: Receiver's unique identifier

role.description: Receiver's role

avatar.description: URL of receiver's avatar

createdAt.description: Account creation timestamp

conversationId.description: Conversation ID for receiver context

reactions.description: Aggregated reaction counts for this message, grouped by reaction type

count.description: Total number of users who added this reaction

reactedByMe.description: Whether the current authenticated user has added this reaction

sentAt.description: Unix timestamp when the message was sent

updatedAt.description: Unix timestamp when the message was last updated

messageSchema.description: Represents a message sent between users or in a group conversation. Contains the message content, sender/receiver information, and metadata.

id.description: Unique identifier for this message, auto-generated by CometChat

conversationId.description: Identifier linking this message to its conversation. Format: 'user_<uid>' for 1-on-1 chats or 'group_<guid>' for group chats

sender.description: The UID of the user who sent this message

receiverType.description: Indicates whether the message was sent to a user or group. Values: 'user' for direct messages, 'group' for group messages

receiver.description: The UID of the recipient user or GUID of the recipient group

category.description: The category of the message. Values: 'message' for standard messages (text, image, file, audio, video), 'custom' for custom message types, 'action' for system-generated action messages

type.description: The type of message content. For category='message': 'text', 'image', 'file', 'audio', 'video'. For category='custom': any custom type string defined by your application

data.description: Contains the message content and related metadata

text.description: The text content of the message (for text messages)

metadata.description: Custom key-value pairs attached to the message for application-specific data

entities.description: Contains detailed information about the sender and receiver entities

uid.description: Unique identifier of the sender

role.description: Role assigned to the sender (e.g., 'default', 'admin')

avatar.description: URL of the sender's avatar image

status.description: Online status of the sender ('available' or 'offline')

createdAt.description: Unix timestamp when the sender's account was created

conversationId.description: Conversation ID for the sender's context

entityType.description: Type of entity, always 'user' for sender

receiver.description: Information about the message receiver (user or group)

entity.description: The receiver entity object (user or group)

uid.description: Unique identifier of the receiver (for user receivers)

role.description: Role assigned to the receiver (for user receivers)

avatar.description: URL of the receiver's avatar image

status.description: Online status of the receiver ('available' or 'offline')

createdAt.description: Unix timestamp when the receiver's account was created

conversationId.description: Conversation ID for the receiver's context

entityType.description: Type of entity: 'user' for direct messages, 'group' for group messages

sentAt.description: Unix timestamp when the message was sent

updatedAt.description: Unix timestamp when the message was last updated (e.g., edited)

moderationMessageData.description: Can contain any additional properties except for the key properties.

text.description:
The meaning of the `data.text` property depends on the values of `category` and `type`:
1. When `category` is `'message'` and `type` is `'text'`, it represents the text content of the message.
2. When `category` is `'message'` and `type` is not `'text'`, it represents the caption associated with the attachment.

customData.description: when category==”custom”, this property can have any JSON object.

attachments.description: For the messages with image, video, audio or file type (i.e. category=="message" && type !="text"), the property contains an array of attachment objects.

url.description: Contains the URL of the attachment. The developer has to make sure that the URL is accessible while calling the API. The API will be downloading the attachment from its current location and upload it to CometChat’s attachment storage.

size.description: The size of the attachment(in bytes).

type.description: oneOnOne or group

until.description: This is a valid timestamp from the future, E.g: 1710696964705

objectEntitySchema.description: Contains entity information for action messages, describing who performed an action, who it affects, and what was acted upon.

by.description: The user who performed the action

entity.description: User details of the action performer

uid.description: Unique identifier of the user

role.description: Role assigned to the user

createdAt.description: Unix timestamp when the user was created

for.description: The entity affected by the action (user or group)

type.description: Group type: 'public', 'password', or 'private'

createdAt.description: Unix timestamp when the entity was created

updatedAt.description: Unix timestamp when the entity was last updated

updatedBy.description: UID of the user who last updated the entity

membersCount.description: Number of members in the group

conversationId.description: Conversation ID for this entity

on.description: The object that was acted upon (e.g., a user being added/removed)

uid.description: Unique identifier of the user

role.description: Role assigned to the user

avatar.description: URL of the user's avatar

createdAt.description: Unix timestamp when the user was created

updatedAt.description: Unix timestamp when the user was last updated

conversationId.description: Conversation ID for this user

messagesSetting.description:
1: Don't notify
2: Notify for all messages
3: Notify for messages with mentions

repliesSetting.description:
1: Don't notify
2: Notify for all replies
3: Notify for replies with mentions

reactionsSetting.description:
1: Don't notify
2: Notify for reactions received on own messages
3: Notify for reactions received on all messages

pnTokenSchema.description: Push notification token registration schema. Supports FCM (Firebase Cloud Messaging), APNS (Apple Push Notification Service), and VOIP tokens for different platforms.

groupMessages.description:
1: Don't notify
2: Notify for all messages
3: Notify for messages with mentions

groupReplies.description:
1: Don't notify
2: Notify for all replies
3: Notify for replies with mentions

groupReactions.description:
1: Don't notify
2: Notify for reactions received on own messages
3: Notify for reactions received on all messages

oneOnOneMessages.description:
1: Don't notify
2: Notify for all messages
3: Notify for messages with mentions

oneOnOneReplies.description:
1: Don't notify
2: Notify for all replies
3: Notify for replies with mentions

oneOnOneReactions.description:
1: Don't notify
2: Notify for reactions received on own messages
3: Notify for reactions received on all messages

reactionSchema.description: Represents a single reaction added to a message by a user. Contains the reaction emoji/identifier and information about who reacted.

id.description: Unique identifier for this reaction record

messageId.description: ID of the message this reaction is attached to

uid.description: UID of the user who added this reaction

reactedAt.description: Unix timestamp when the reaction was added

reactedBy.description: Detailed information about the user who added the reaction

uid.description: Unique identifier of the user

role.description: Role assigned to the user

avatar.description: URL of the user's avatar image

createdAt.description: Unix timestamp when the user account was created

conversationId.description: Conversation ID for the user's context

roleSchema.description: Represents a user role for access control. Roles define what actions users can perform and who they can interact with in the chat system.

role.description: Unique identifier for the role. This value is assigned to users via the 'role' property

name.description: Display name for the role (e.g., 'Administrator', 'Moderator', 'Premium User')

description.description: Human-readable description of the role's purpose and permissions

metadata.description: Custom key-value pairs for storing application-specific role data

settings.description: Role-specific settings that control user capabilities

listUsers.description: Controls which users this role can see. Values: 'all' (see all users), 'friends' (only friends), 'none' (no users)

sendMessagesTo.description: Controls who this role can send messages to. Values: 'all' (anyone), 'friends' (only friends), 'none' (no one)

createdAt.description: Unix timestamp when the role was created

notifyForUnreadOnly.description: If the value is false, the notification will contain all the messages, not just unread.

includeMessageObjectSetting.description: Includes the message object in the SMS payload

includeSenderMetadataSetting.description: Includes sender metadata in the message object

includeReceiverMetadataSetting.description: Includes receiver metadata in the message object

includeMessageMetadataSetting.description: Includes message metadata in the message object

triggerSchema.description: Represents an event trigger that can be assigned to webhooks. Triggers define which events will cause webhook notifications to be sent.

category.description: Category grouping for the trigger. Values: 'message' (message events), 'user' (user events), 'group' (group events), 'call' (call events)

description.description: Human-readable description of when this trigger fires

type.description: oneOnOne or group

unregisterpnToken.description: Request body for unregistering a push notification token

authToken.description: The user's authentication token associated with the push token to unregister

updatemessageSchema.description: Represents an action message generated when a message is edited or updated. Contains information about who made the change, the affected message, and the action performed.

id.description: Unique identifier for this action message

conversationId.description: Identifier linking this action to its conversation. Format: 'user_<uid>' for 1-on-1 chats or 'group_<guid>' for group chats

sender.description: The UID of the user who triggered this action (typically the message editor)

receiverType.description: Indicates whether the original message was in a user or group conversation. Values: 'user' or 'group'

receiver.description: The UID of the recipient user or GUID of the recipient group

type.description: The type of action performed, e.g., 'edited' for message edits

data.description: Contains details about the action and affected entities

entities.description: Contains information about who performed the action, who it affects, and what was changed

by.description: The user who performed the action

entity.description: User details of the action performer

uid.description: Unique identifier of the user who performed the action

role.description: Role assigned to the user

createdAt.description: Unix timestamp when the user account was created

updatedAt.description: Unix timestamp when the user was last updated

for.description: The user or group affected by the action

uid.description: Unique identifier of the affected user

name.description: Display name of the affected user

avatar.description: URL of the user's avatar image

role.description: Role assigned to the user

createdAt.description: Unix timestamp when the user account was created

on.description: The message that was acted upon

entity.description: The original message that was edited

id.description: Unique identifier of the edited message

conversationId.description: Conversation ID of the edited message

sender.description: UID of the original message sender

receiver.description: UID or GUID of the message receiver

type.description: Type of the original message

uid.description: Sender's unique identifier

role.description: Sender's role

avatar.description: URL of sender's avatar

createdAt.description: Account creation timestamp

uid.description: Receiver's unique identifier

role.description: Receiver's role

avatar.description: URL of receiver's avatar

createdAt.description: Account creation timestamp

conversationId.description: Conversation ID for receiver context

sentAt.description: Unix timestamp when the original message was sent

editedAt.description: Unix timestamp when the message was edited

editedBy.description: UID of the user who edited the message

updatedAt.description: Unix timestamp of the last update

tags.description: Tags associated with the message

sentAt.description: Unix timestamp when this action message was generated

updatedAt.description: Unix timestamp when this action message was last updated

usageMetricsSchema.description: Aggregated usage metrics for your CometChat app. Contains call minutes, user activity, and the time range for the data.

metrics.description: Usage metric values for the specified time range

audio_minutes.description: Total minutes of audio calls during the time range

video_minutes.description: Total minutes of video calls during the time range

recorded_minutes.description: Total minutes of recorded calls during the time range

active_users.description: Number of unique users who were active during the time range

concurrent_users.description: Peak number of users connected simultaneously during the time range

time_range.description: The time range for which metrics are reported

fromDate.description: Unix timestamp marking the start of the metrics period

toDate.description: Unix timestamp marking the end of the metrics period

userConversationSchema.description: Represents a user-specific view of a conversation, including unread counts and last message from the user's perspective.

conversationId.description: Unique identifier for the conversation. Format: 'user_<uid>' for 1-on-1 or 'group_<guid>' for groups

conversationType.description: Type of conversation: 'user' for direct messages, 'group' for group chats

unreadMessageCount.description: Number of unread messages for the authenticated user in this conversation

createdAt.description: Unix timestamp when the conversation was created

updatedAt.description: Unix timestamp of the last activity in this conversation

lastMessage.description: The most recent message in this conversation

conversationId.description: Conversation ID this message belongs to

receiver.description: UID or GUID of the receiver

type.description: Message type (e.g., 'text', 'image')

sentAt.description: Unix timestamp when the message was sent

updatedAt.description: Unix timestamp when the message was last updated

conversationWith.description: The user or group entity this conversation is with

uid.description: The primary-key/ unique identifier of the receiver.

avatar.description: URL to the profile picture of the user receiving the message.

link.description: Profile page URL of the receiver.

role.description: Role of the receiver. Should be created already via the Create role API.

createdAt.description: A 10-digit timestamp at which the receiver was created.

tags.description: A string array containing receiver tags.

userSchema.description: Represents a CometChat user account. Contains the user's profile information, status, and metadata.

uid.description: Unique identifier for the user. Must be unique across your app. Max length: 100 characters. Allowed characters: alphanumeric, underscore, and hyphen

name.description: Display name of the user shown in chat interfaces. Max length: 100 characters

avatar.description: URL of the user's profile picture. Must be a valid, publicly accessible URL

link.description: Optional URL associated with the user's profile (e.g., website, social profile)

metadata.description: Custom key-value pairs for storing application-specific user data. Max size: 100KB

email.description: Example metadata field - you can store any custom data here

status.description: Online presence status of the user. Values: 'available' (online) or 'offline'

role.description: Role assigned to the user for access control. Default role is 'default'. Custom roles can be created via the Roles API

lastActiveAt.description: Unix timestamp of the user's last activity in the app

hasBlockedMe.description: Indicates if this user has blocked the authenticated user (only present in user-context responses)

blockedByMe.description: Indicates if the authenticated user has blocked this user (only present in user-context responses)

tags.description: Custom tags for categorizing and filtering users

deactivatedAt.description: Unix timestamp when the user was deactivated. Null if user is active

createdAt.description: Unix timestamp when the user account was created

updatedAt.description: Unix timestamp when the user account was last updated

uid.description: The primary-key/ unique identifier of the sender.

avatar.description: URL to the profile picture of the user sending the message.

link.description: Profile page URL of the sender.

role.description: Role of the sender. Should be created already via the Create role API.

createdAt.description: A 10-digit timestamp at which the sender was created.

tags.description: A string array containing sender tags.

webhookSchema.description: Represents a webhook configuration for receiving real-time event notifications. Webhooks send HTTP POST requests to your server when specified events occur in CometChat.

id.description: Unique identifier for the webhook, auto-generated by CometChat

name.description: Display name for the webhook to help identify its purpose

webhookURL.description: The HTTPS endpoint URL where webhook payloads will be sent. Must be publicly accessible

useBasicAuth.description: Whether to use HTTP Basic Authentication when sending webhook requests

username.description: Username for HTTP Basic Authentication (required if useBasicAuth is true)

password.description: Password for HTTP Basic Authentication (required if useBasicAuth is true). Not returned in responses

triggers.description: List of event triggers that will fire this webhook. See triggerSchema for available triggers

enabled.description: Whether the webhook is currently active. Disabled webhooks will not receive event notifications

createdAt.description: Unix timestamp when the webhook was created

updatedAt.description: Unix timestamp when the webhook was last updated

authToken.name: authToken
authToken.description: The authentication token string for a user. Used to identify and manage specific auth tokens

conversationId.name: conversationId
conversationId.description: Unique identifier of the conversation. Format: 'user_<uid>' for 1-on-1 conversations or 'group_<guid>' for group conversations

uid--conversation.name: uid
uid--conversation.description: UID of the user whose conversation needs to be fetched

guid--conversation.name: guid
guid--conversation.description: GUID of the group whose conversation needs to be fetched

uid.name: uid
uid.description: An UID of a user.

requiredonBehalfOf.name: onBehalfOf
requiredonBehalfOf.description: UID of the user on whose behalf the action is performed.

onBehalfOf.name: onBehalfOf
onBehalfOf.description: UID of the user on whose behalf the action is performed.

pushToken.name: pushToken
pushToken.description: The push notification token to unregister or manage

apiKey.description: API Key with fullAccess scope(i.e. Rest API Key from the Dashboard).
apiKey.name: apikey

tags.name: API Keys
tags.description: Manage API keys for authenticating REST API requests. API keys control access to your CometChat app and define permission scopes (fullAccess or authOnly). Use these endpoints to create, list, update, and delete API keys for different integration scenarios such as server-side operations or client authentication.

tags.name: Roles
tags.description: Configure role-based access control (RBAC) for your users. Roles define what API endpoints and features users can access. Use these endpoints to create custom roles, assign permissions, and manage access rights across your application. Default roles include 'default' for regular users and 'admin' for administrative access.

tags.name: Auth Tokens
tags.description: Generate and manage authentication tokens for user login. Auth tokens are required by CometChat client SDKs (Web, iOS, Android) to establish real-time connections. Use these endpoints to create tokens when users log in to your app, list active tokens, and revoke tokens for security purposes such as logout or session management.

tags.name: Users
tags.description: Create and manage user accounts in your CometChat app. Users are the core entities that send and receive messages. Use these endpoints to create users during onboarding, update user profiles (name, avatar, metadata), list users with filtering and pagination, deactivate/reactivate accounts, and permanently delete users when needed. Start here to populate your app with users.

tags.name: Blocked Users
tags.description: Manage user blocking relationships. When a user blocks another user, they will no longer receive messages, calls, or presence updates from the blocked user. Use these endpoints to block users, unblock users, and retrieve the list of blocked users for a specific user.

tags.name: Friends
tags.description: Manage friend relationships between users. Friends lists enable features like showing online friends, friend-only messaging, and social connections. Use these endpoints to add friends, remove friends, and retrieve a user's friend list with pagination support.

tags.name: Groups
tags.description: Create and manage group conversations. Groups enable multi-user chat rooms with configurable privacy settings (public, password-protected, or private). Use these endpoints to create groups, update group settings (name, icon, metadata), manage group ownership, and delete groups. Groups support features like member limits, join modes, and custom metadata.

tags.name: Group Members
tags.description: Manage group membership and member roles. Members can have different scopes: 'participant' (regular member), 'moderator' (can kick/mute users), or 'admin' (full group management). Use these endpoints to add members, remove members, update member scope, and list group members with filtering options.

tags.name: Banned Users
tags.description: Manage banned users within groups. Banning removes a user from a group and prevents them from rejoining. Use these endpoints to ban disruptive users, unban users to restore access, and list all banned users in a group. Only group admins and moderators can perform ban operations.

tags.name: Messages
tags.description: Send, retrieve, and manage messages in conversations. Messages can be text, media, custom data, or system messages. Use these endpoints to send messages on behalf of users, retrieve message history with pagination, edit messages, delete messages, and manage message metadata. Supports both 1-on-1 and group conversations.

tags.name: Conversations
tags.description: Access and manage conversation threads. A conversation represents the message history between two users (1-on-1) or within a group. Use these endpoints to list conversations with unread counts, retrieve specific conversations, mark conversations as read/delivered, reset conversation history, and delete conversations.

tags.name: Calls
tags.description: Manage voice and video calling functionality. Access call history, retrieve call details, and monitor call quality metrics. Calls integrate with CometChat's real-time communication infrastructure for audio and video conversations.

tags.name: Notifications
tags.description: Configure push notification settings and delivery. Push notifications alert users about new messages and events when they're not actively using your app. Use these endpoints to configure FCM/APNS credentials, customize notification templates, manage user notification preferences, register device tokens, and control notification delivery settings.

tags.name: Moderation
tags.description: The REST collections for Moderations.

tags.name: Restrict Features
tags.description: Control feature availability for users based on roles. Feature restrictions allow you to enable or disable specific CometChat features (messaging, calling, groups) for different user segments. Use these endpoints to configure feature access rules and manage feature availability across your app.

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description: Set up webhook endpoints to receive real-time event notifications. Webhooks enable server-to-server communication when events occur in your CometChat app (new messages, user actions, group changes). Use these endpoints to create webhooks, configure target URLs, manage authentication, and control which events trigger notifications.

tags.name: Triggers
tags.description: Configure event triggers for webhooks. Triggers define which CometChat events (message sent, user created, group joined, etc.) should fire webhook notifications. Use these endpoints to add triggers to webhooks, remove triggers, and list available trigger types for real-time event integration.

tags.name: Metrics
tags.description: Access usage analytics and metrics for your CometChat app. Metrics provide insights into message volume, active users, API usage, and other key performance indicators. Use these endpoints to retrieve daily/monthly statistics, monitor app health, and track usage against your subscription limits.
